scripts.build:cashflow: bun run --filter @tally-evals/examples-mastra build && bun run --filter @tally-evals/tally build
scripts.lint:cashflow: biome check --config-path packages/biome-config/biome.json apps/examples/mastra/src/mastra/agents/cashflow-copilot-agent.ts apps/examples/mastra/src/mastra/index.ts apps/examples/mastra/src/mastra/tools/cashflow apps/examples/mastra/tests/trajectories/cashflow apps/examples/mastra/tests/utils/harness.ts packages/tally/src/metrics/cashflow packages/tally/src/metrics/index.ts
scripts.check:cashflow: bun run lint:cashflow && bun run --filter @tally-evals/tally build
